title: Integrating Large Language Models in Enterprise Applications

scenes.title: Introduction to LLMs in Enterprises
scenes.narration_text: Welcome! Today, we'll explore how Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming enterprise applications. From healthcare to finance, these models are evolving from simple demos to complex decision-makers within codebases.
scenes.visual_description: A title screen with 'Integrating LLMs in Enterprises' and a background of interconnected nodes representing different industries.

scenes.title: Understanding Prompts as Executable Logic
scenes.narration_text: Prompts are more than configurations; they're executable instructions for LLMs. Unlike deterministic software, prompts can produce varied outputs due to their stochastic nature.
scenes.visual_description: A diagram showing a prompt box leading to an LLM with arrows pointing to different output possibilities.

scenes.title: Real-World Failures: Lessons Learned
scenes.narration_text: Consider Chevrolet's erroneous sale or Air Canada’s chatbot mishap. These examples highlight the risks when LLM prompts are inadequately instrumented.
scenes.visual_description: Two side-by-side case study boxes with images of a car and an airplane, each with a caution symbol.

scenes.title: Historical Computing Paradigms vs. LLMs
scenes.narration_text: Just as punch cards evolved to high-level programming languages, we're now shifting towards LLMs. This requires new infrastructures for managing their unique challenges.
scenes.visual_description: A timeline showing the evolution from punch cards to LLMs with icons representing each stage.

scenes.title: Building Applications with LLMs
scenes.narration_text: To effectively integrate LLMs, we need a robust development infrastructure. This includes risk management and ensuring operational reliability.
scenes.visual_description: A flowchart illustrating the steps of building an application with LLM integration.

scenes.title: The Nature of Prompts in LLMs
scenes.narration_text: Prompts are sets of instructions that guide LLMs. They can include text, images, and other contexts, making them powerful tools for executing business logic.
scenes.visual_description: A prompt box with various input types (text, image) flowing into an LLM.

scenes.title: LLMs in Action: A Chatbot Example
scenes.narration_text: Imagine a chatbot that issues refunds. The conversation itself becomes executable code, demonstrating the practical application of LLMs.
scenes.visual_description: A chat interface showing a refund request and response with arrows indicating execution flow.

scenes.title: Deterministic vs. Stochastic Outputs
scenes.narration_text: Unlike deterministic software where inputs yield consistent outputs, LLMs can produce different results for the same input due to their stochastic nature.
scenes.visual_description: Two parallel diagrams: one with a calculator showing '1+1=2' and another with an LLM showing varied outputs.

scenes.title: Instrumenting Prompts for Success
scenes.narration_text: Properly instrumented prompts are crucial. They ensure that LLMs perform reliably and effectively within enterprise applications.
scenes.visual_description: A checklist of steps for instrumenting prompts, with a checkmark icon next to each step.

scenes.title: The Future of LLMs in Enterprises
scenes.narration_text: LLMs offer powerful capabilities but also introduce complexities. The future lies in creating robust systems to support these new paradigms, ensuring stability and efficacy.
scenes.visual_description: A closing screen with the title 'Future of LLMs' and a network diagram showing interconnected applications.
